prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Magnuson TVS2650 (6.2L SRT Demon's supercharged HEMI SRT engine code: ESF) with a 3.0L/rev rotor set, 10.5psi boost (stock is 14.5psi but optimized for reliability), and a custom billet aluminum pulley system from ZPE (ZPE Technology) reducing parasitic loss by 12%

Full fuel system overhaul with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, ID1700x injectors (1,700cc/min), and a Fore Innovations F2i-1000 fuel pressure regulator to support 1,200+ HP on E85, paired with a Radium Engineering dual catch can system to prevent oil dilution in the 6.2L HEMI

Differential and drivetrain reinforcement with a Wavetrac helical LSD (limited-slip differential) for the 8HP90 transmission, paired with a billet aluminum driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop (rated for 1,500 HP) and a South Bend Clutch dual-disc setup (organic/metallic hybrid) with a billet steel flywheel for launch control optimization
estetica: Widebody conversion using the Rocket Bunny V3 Challenger kit (Pandem Design), featuring carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser with integrated brake ducts, paired with a custom matte Satin Black vinyl wrap (3M 2080 series) and red pinstriping by Vinyl Frog

OEM+ Demon-specific aero with a custom carbon fiber hood from Anderson Composites (replica of the SRT Demon 1320 hood with functional heat extractors), paired with a Seibon carbon fiber trunk lid and a custom rear spoiler from APR Performance (GTC-300 adjustable wing in matte carbon fiber)

Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery) and a custom Demon-themed roll cage from Autopower Industries (bolt-in, 4-point with harness bar), paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede) and a Demon-specific shift knob from Barton Shifters (weighted, billet aluminum)
